task_input: My page 'quick-start.md' has a link to 'installation.md' but wiki_lint says installation.md is still an orphan. I linked TO it!
expected_behavior: Should explain that linking TO a page only addresses the incoming link count. installation.md still needs outgoing links - it needs to contain links to other wiki pages, like a Related section pointing to prerequisites or next steps.

task_input: I ran wiki_lint and got: 'Orphan page: index.md - 0 incoming, 0 outgoing'. I've never edited index.md. Is this an error?
expected_behavior: Should explain that index.md is indeed an orphan and needs both outgoing and incoming links. A homepage should link out to main wiki sections, and other pages should link back to index.md.

task_input: What does wiki_lint actually check to determine if a page is an orphan?
expected_behavior: Should explain the dual condition: wiki_lint defines an orphan as a page with BOTH zero outgoing links (no wiki links FROM this page to others) AND zero incoming links (no wiki links TO this page from others). Both must be true.

task_input: My colleague says they fixed the orphan issue on 'deployment-guide.md' by adding links from 5 different pages to it. Will this satisfy wiki_lint?
expected_behavior: Should indicate this is not sufficient. While it provides incoming links, the page itself still has 0 outgoing links. The colleague must also add outbound links from deployment-guide.md to other wiki pages.

task_input: wiki_lint reports 'code-review-and-quality' as a broken link. What should I do?
expected_behavior: Should explain two options: (1) Create the target page 'code-review-and-quality.md' if it should exist, or (2) Find and remove/fix the reference pointing to it. Should include the grep search command to locate the broken reference.

task_input: I just created a new wiki page called 'project-overview.md' and wiki_lint reports it as an orphan. I added links TO it from other pages. Why is it still an orphan?
expected_behavior: Should explain that wiki_lint defines orphans as pages with BOTH zero outgoing AND zero incoming links. Adding only inbound links is insufficient - must also add outgoing links FROM the orphan page itself.

task_input: Help me fix the orphan page 'database-schema.md'. I understand it needs both types of links. Walk me through exactly what to add and where.
expected_behavior: Should provide complete instructions: (1) Add a '## Related' section at the bottom of database-schema.md with outbound wiki links, (2) Update at least one other page to link TO database-schema.md, (3) Run wiki_lint to verify.

task_input: wiki_lint reports a broken link 'missing-page'. I grep'd and found it in two files. One file references a real page and one references something that doesn't exist. How do I handle this?
expected_behavior: Should explain: (1) For the reference to the real page, it was likely meant to be a different link - investigate context. (2) For the non-existent reference, either create missing-page.md or remove/fix that reference.

task_input: I added a Related section at the bottom of 'architecture.md' with links to three other wiki pages. wiki_lint still shows it as orphan. What am I missing?
expected_behavior: Should identify that adding only outgoing links is not enough. The other pages need to link BACK to 'architecture.md' to provide inbound links. Both directions are required.

task_input: After adding a Related section to my orphan page, wiki_lint shows it still has 0 incoming links. What should I do now?
expected_behavior: Should identify this as the second half of the fix needed. The outgoing links are now added, but inbound links are still missing. Must update at least one other wiki page to include a link TO the formerly orphan page.
